name: PM Brief Generator — Slack → Agent → Notion + Reply

nodes.name: Webhook (Slack Event)
nodes.notes: Replace with Slack trigger node after connecting Slack OAuth. Set event to 'message' in a specific channel.

nodes.name: Call Brief Generator Agent
nodes.notes: IMPORTANT: Replace URL with your actual agent endpoint. For local testing, run: python agent_http.py (see README). For production, deploy agent to Render/Railway/Fly.io and use that URL.

nodes.name: Create Notion Page
nodes.notes: Set YOUR_NOTION_DATABASE_ID to your briefs database ID. Connect Notion credentials in n8n Settings > Credentials.

nodes.name: Reply in Slack
nodes.notes: Connect Slack credentials. This replies in the same channel the message came from.

import_steps: 1. Go to n8n.io/cloud and create a free account
3. Click the three-dot menu → Import from JSON → paste this file
4. Set credentials: Slack OAuth app, Notion integration, your agent HTTP endpoint
5. For local testing: run agent_http.py (included in repo) on port 8080
6. Activate workflow → test by posting in your Slack test channel
agent_endpoint_options: Cloud: deploy to Render.com (free tier) — see README deploy section
